metadata.scheme_name: Monsanto Scholarship (M.Sc. Agriculture Science and Agriculture Biotechnology)

raw_data.details: The “Monsanto Scholarship (M. Sc. Agricultural Science & Agricultural Biotechnology)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing an M. Sc. in Agricultural Science & Agricultural Biotechnology by awarding them scholarships for three semesters.
raw_data.benefits: Rate of Scholarship: ₹1,000 per month (For 3 semesters only).
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a student. The applicant must be enrolled in an M. Sc. in Agricultural Science or Agricultural Biotechnology program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of three semesters only.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the scholarship payments.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme.

Agriculture Science and Agriculture Biotechnology)Agricultural BiotechnologyM Sc Agricultural ScienceMonsantoScholarshipStudentDetailsThe “Monsanto Scholarship (M. Sc. Agricultural Science & Agricultural Biotechnology)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing an M. Sc. in Agricultural Science & Agricultural Biotechnology by awarding them scholarships for three semesters. BenefitsRate of Scholarship: ₹1,000 per month (For 3 semesters only). EligibilityThe applicant must be a student. The applicant must be enrolled in an M. Sc. in Agricultural Science or Agricultural Biotechnology program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of three semesters only. Application ProcessOfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the scholarship payments. Documents RequiredDocuments are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme. Frequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible to apply? Applicants must be students enrolled in the M. Sc. program in Agricultural Science or Agricultural Biotechnology at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. What is the scholarship amount? The scholarship provides ₹1,000 per month. For how long is the scholarship awarded? The scholarship is awarded for a duration of three semesters. How can students apply for the scholarship? Students must submit their applications using the prescribed application form provided by the university. Who evaluates the applications? A committee constituted by the Vice Chancellor reviews and evaluates all applications. How is the final selection made? Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, and selected students are awarded the scholarship. Can students from other universities apply? No. Sources And References[Guidelines (Page No. 185)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply?
faqs.answer: Applicants must be students enrolled in the M. Sc. program in Agricultural Science or Agricultural Biotechnology at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.

faqs.question: For how long is the scholarship awarded?
faqs.answer: The scholarship is awarded for a duration of three semesters.

faqs.question: How can students apply for the scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students must submit their applications using the prescribed application form provided by the university.

faqs.question: Who evaluates the applications?
faqs.answer: A committee constituted by the Vice Chancellor reviews and evaluates all applications.

faqs.question: How is the final selection made?
faqs.answer: Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, and selected students are awarded the scholarship.

faqs.question: Can students from other universities apply?
